entities.name: P2 Single Source of Truth
entities.context: SSOT - one canonical location for each piece of data

entities.name: P8 Minimal Context
entities.context: Less is more - reduce cognitive load

entities.name: P25 Code Is Free, Thinking Is Expensive
P32 Simple Over Easy
entities.context: Few concepts better than familiar patterns

entities.name: P35 Version Don't Overwrite
entities.context: Create new versions rather than modifying in place; immutable inputs

entities.name: P36 Make State Visible
entities.context: Hidden state causes bugs; declare and validate explicitly

entities.name: P37 Design as Pipelines
entities.context: Input → Transform → Output with recoverable stages

entities.name: P38 Isolate and Parallelize
entities.context: Workers don't share mutable state; proactively recommend parallelization

entities.name: P39 Audit Everything
entities.context: Every change traceable to cause, trigger, and timestamp

relationships.context: N5 principles govern how Zo operates and builds
P5 is about preview; P35 extends to full immutability
P18 checks state; P36 requires declaring it upfront
P20 is about components; P37 is about flow between them
P11 plans for failure; P38 contains failure through isolation
P21 documents intent; P39 documents execution
Pulse implements worker isolation and parallel orchestration
Pulse builds use Brief → Drop → Deposit → Synthesis pipeline
SESSION_STATE makes conversation state explicit and inspectable
Append-only ledger enables isolated workers to share learnings
Careerspan decomposer creates new YAML files, never modifies input briefs
Both constrain cognitive load through limits

relationships.from: P25 Code Is Free, Thinking Is Expensive
